programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Skeletons tell of both violent death and tenderness at the royal seat of power in Bamburgh, Northumbria, while at a remarkable community project at a shopping centre in Sittingbourne, people curate the grave goods of their own ancestors.

programme.title: River Hunters
programme.desc: US YouTube sensation Beau Ouimette and presenter Rick Edwards visit a range of historically significant sites in search of incredible archaeological finds.

programme.title: River Hunters
programme.desc: River Hunters sees Rick and river-searching expert Beau searching the unexplored rivers and waterways of Britain, unearthing treasures from the past which reveal how our various ancestors used to live.

programme.title: River Hunters
programme.desc: Battle of Culloden: Rick and Beau return to tackle new rivers in a brand-new series. From Wales to Scotland, the pair investigate the cold and murky waters of historic sites. (1 of 3)

programme.desc: Rick and Beau return to tackle new rivers in a brand-new series. From Wales to Scotland, the pair investigate the cold and murky waters of historic sites.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores the story of Stewart Britain by visiting Stirling, the home of the Scottish royals who eventually took the English throne in 1603 and created Great Britain.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice is in Lincoln, getting to grips with life in medieval England. She visits the magnificent cathedral that was once the tallest building in the world and re-lives the battle at Lincoln Castle.

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Do The English Win Every War?
programme.desc: Al is joined by proud Frenchman Fred Sirieix to separate the fact from the fiction of the Napoleonic wars. Together they take a deeper look into the battles of Waterloo and Trafalgar.

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Do The British Win Every War?
programme.desc: Al joins forces with German comedian Henning Wehn to delve deeper into the truth behind some WWII myths. Taking to the skies, they explore whether the Spitfire really was the saviour of Britain that it was cracked up to be.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts travels back to the Viking Age in Britain and visits excavations that are revealing a different side to these seafaring pirates from Scandinavia. She looks for signs of the earliest Viking settlers in the Outer Hebrides, and in Orkney - where Viking dominance outlasted anywhere else in Britain - she visits the excavation of a Viking chiefs citadel and finds evidence of their way-of-life.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Focusing on Roman Britannia, where finds include the thickening mystery of 97 baby skeletons found by the Thames, a newly discovered town in rural Devon that turns history on its head, and a Roman cult figure buried for 1700 years beneath a fort.

programme.title: River Hunters
programme.desc: Rick and Beau return to tackle new rivers in a brand-new series. From Wales to Scotland, the pair investigate the cold and murky waters of historic sites.

programme.title: River Hunters
programme.desc: River Hunters sees Rick and river-searching expert Beau searching the unexplored rivers and waterways of Britain, unearthing treasures from the past which reveal how our various ancestors used to live.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: In medieval England, the North was ruled from York. Dan Jones explores the history of its castle, from the Viking Jorvik and the Normans, through the dark days of the anti-Jewish pogrom and the imprisonment of the Knights Templar, to one of its most colourful inmates - the legendary highwayman Dick Turpin.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: With the aid of dramatic reconstruction, Dan Jones explores the 900-year history of the beautiful Leeds Castle in Kent, from its origins as a royal Saxon familys manor and Norman stronghold to the private property of six medieval queens, a Tudor palace, a Jacobean country house, a Georgian mansion and an elegant 20th-century retreat for the rich and famous.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson sets off on his most curious walk yet, across the ancient and turbulent kingdom of Northumbria. In the seventh century, at the height of the Dark Ages, the rule of Northumbria stretched from Edinburgh to York.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson walks along the North Norfolk coast and through one of the least developed spots in the country.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Finds include the lost WWI training trenches on Salisbury Plain, Britains first `double henge, discovered just down the road from Stonehenge, where the evidence suggests our ancestors feasted and made sacred offerings as part of a visit to the ritualistic Stonehenge landscape, and luxury foreign goods discovered at Tintagel, the legendary childhood home of King Arthur.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: The team is in the north of Britain where they uncover evidence of the first Roman siege in Britain, Scottish man-made islands and a famous monastery.

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Do The British Win Every War?
programme.desc: What did the Romans ever do for us? Well, they certainly put the Brits through their paces back in AD 43. Al is joined by Caesar Bruno Tonioli to look at key battle tactics during the Roman Invasion. From wading through the waves in Roman armour, to seeing how hard it was to invade, to the power struggle the Celts went through to hold onto their identity and just how difficult it is to fire a catapult.

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Do The British Win Every War?
programme.desc: Al faces up to one of the worlds superpowers and the richest nation on Earth to discover how the former British colony of America somehow slipped through its fingers. Joining him to fight for his nations honour is comedian Reginald D Hunter.

programme.title: Truthseekers
programme.desc: Discover the mystery of Genghis Khan and the unknown location of his place of burial. It is believed that his soldiers returned his corpse to Mongolia, but legend has it that those who knew its location were murdered to keep the secret.

programme.title: Truthseekers
programme.desc: Scientists, historians and archaeologists attempt to unravel the greatest mysteries of history.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson is out to discover why Pembrokeshire feels so English. There are castles everywhere and it boasts one of the countrys finest cathedrals, sure signs that the Normans stamped their mark all over this little slice of Wales.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson visits the British Channel Islands, which were occupied by Nazi Germany for five years between 1940 and 1945.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts visits a house in Otterton, Devon, which is given a stunning transformation to match the views from the windows, Lucy Alexander looks round a small one-bedroom flat in Tottenham, London, and Dion Dublin peers into a building in Alvaston, Derby, which is in a dangerous state of disrepair.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin visit a one-bedroom flat in Catford, London, a large house near the River Mersey and a semi-detached property in Alvaston in Derby.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: An end-terrace house in Alfreton in Derby bought by two brothers, a mid-terrace on the coast at Seaham in County Durham and a large three-storey property with a flat and shop in Taylorstown in the Rhondda Valley are all sold at auction. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin talk to the new owners to find out what they have planned for their auction buys.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts falls in love with a quirky cottage in Malvern bought by a builder and his wife, Dion Dublin talks to a first-time property developer who sees her end-terrace house in Chell in Stoke-on-Trent as something for her pension pot, and Lucy Alexander meets a divorced couple who have decided to form a new union as property developers doing up a shop and flat in Dover, Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A large piece of land in Ratby in Leicestershire, a terrace in Chesterton in Staffordshire and a 1930s semi with a huge garden and huge potential are all sold at auction. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin meet the developers hoping to breathe new life into their auction buys.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A two-bedroom detached house in Basford in Nottingham, a top floor flat in Portsmouth and a large Edwardian terrace in Crewe are all sold under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners and hear about their plans.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A multimillion-pound development in Farningham in Kent, an ambitious, total renovation project in Aspatria in Cumbria and a very small studio flat in Wallington in Surrey are all sold under the hammer. Martin and Lucy meet the new owners to discuss their plans.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A Victorian terrace in Londons Greenwich, two flats in Chatham in Kent and a riverside inn near Great Yarmouth in Norfolk are all sold under the hammer. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin meet the new owners and hear plans for their renovation projects.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A three-bedroom house in Borrowash in Derbyshire, another three-bedder in West Bromwich in the Midlands and a quirky four-bedroom house on the Isle of Sheppey are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A flat in Pegswood in Northumberland, a terrace in Swadlincote in Derbyshire and a former shop in Chatham in Kent are given makeovers.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A mid-terrace house in Wales, a basement office in central London with a huge price tag and two flats in Bootle near Liverpool are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy meets a young couple expecting a baby who have to weigh up whether to live in their auction buy in Sydenham in London while Martin talks to a man and his father in law who have bought their first property together in Trentham near Stoke and Dion meets a man who only went into property development after he retired. His latest buy is a three-bed semi in West Bromwich.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Terraced houses in Tunstall in Shropshire and Prescott in Liverpool and a large flat in Dagenham are all sold under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion have a look round before hearing what the new owners have planned.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A chiropodist, two part-time gardeners and a woman who works on projects in between the school run are todays investors. Theyve bought property in Bullbridge in Derbyshire, Newcastle under Lyme in Staffordshire and Wolverhampton in the West Midlands under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts follows the progress of a couple developing a chalet bungalow in Drakelowe in Staffordshire for their family, while Lucy Alexander talks to a young entrepreneur with grand plans for a three-bed semi in Croydon in London. Dion Dublin looks round a piece of land which runs alongside a tourist steam train track in Coltishall in Norfolk.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts rolls back the clock nearly 12 years to catch up on an ambitious development of a former church in Preston on the Hill in Cheshire, while Lucy Alexander looks round two very different terraced houses in Stoney Stratford, near Milton Keynes, and Streatham in London.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A 1930s terrace in Croydon, a semi in Wolstanton destined to be a family home and the only house on a street in Moorside in Oldham are all under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion visit the properties and meet the new owners.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Emmerdale is one of Britains best-loved and highly-viewed long-running drama soaps - set in the heart of the beautiful countryside of the Yorkshire Dales, this realistic and down-to-earth drama superbly chronicles the joys and the heartbreaks of a tightly-knit countryside community.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The story of everyday life in a small and tightly-knit community - this is the core of the worlds longest running primetime drama serial and the highest-rating programme in the UK. Coronation Street has for over 50 years uniquely combined cult status with popularity and durability - the quality of writing is second to none, portraying believable characters with a large helping of humour. Its themes - love, passion, deception, greed and intrigue - are ones which everyone can relate to.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The police investigate the suspected suicide of a young man, but uncover something more sinister. Elsewhere, Peggys double arrives in town.

programme.desc: When the body of a missing 18-year-old is discovered buried on the moors, Vera delves beyond the original enquiry and into the life and the secrets of the victim.

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The discovery of a 2,000-year-old body offers a new lead in a missing person case. Endeavour and Thursday must investigate the eerie village of Bramford.

programme.title: Trial and Retribution
programme.desc: Recently released from prison, Terry Dyer returns to his East London estate in search of the truth behind a murder he still maintains he did not commit. The father of the victim, Ken Randle, confronts Dyer with a gun, wounding him in a tussle. Chief Superintendent Walker is empathetic to Kens situation and releases him on bail, but Ken becomes doubtful of Dyers guilt.

programme.title: Trial and Retribution
programme.desc: After Terry Dyer is cleared of Nick Fishers murder, DS Satchell knows his career is on the line over his misjudgement in coaxing a statement from Nicks widow. Elsewhere, as Mark Randles sister, Sarah, begins to reveal the truth about her brothers death, Ken Randle stands trial for the murder of Nick Fisher.

In pursuit of the ultimate winter conditions, the event moved north in 2022 to a new base in Umea.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Jeanette and the Chipmunks orchestrate a break-in at Bocarters house to rescue a chimpanzee he keeps in a cage. Alvin is alarmed that Dave will be hosting an auction where hell have to tell jokes because hes not that funny.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.sub-title: The Patrick Show Land; Legend of the Lost Bathroom
programme.desc: The Stars run a Patrick Show theme park in their home; Patrick and Squidina embark on a quest to find the lost bathroom.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.sub-title: From Berneray to Pabbay: The Riddle of the Sands
programme.desc: Paul Murton continues his island odyssey, exploring the remote and fascinating places which scatter our coastline, and meeting the people who call these islands home. On this Grand Tour, Paul is exploring a cluster of islands in the Outer Hebrides. Lying just off the North Uist coast is princely Berneray, where his journey begins. From there he heads south to capture the colours of Grimsay, and then weaves through the marram grass of Kirkibost, to end on the deserted whisky island of Pabbay.

programme.title: Besieged Fortresses, Legendary Battles
programme.sub-title: The Daunting Fortress of Richard the Lionheart
programme.desc: English King Richard the Lionheart builds a formidable castle along Frances Seine River to assert his supremacy over his rich and strategic lands in Normandy. Frances King Philip besieged the site, despite its incredible defences.

programme.title: The First World War: The Peoples Story
programme.desc: Tells the story of one of the most iconic and tragic battles in history through its last survivors and through families at home; when the troops went over the top in June 1916 they imagined this was the attack that would end the war.

programme.title: Lincoln: Divided We Stand
programme.desc: Examining Lincolns journey to the Emancipation Proclamation; the Union Army struggles as Lincoln wrestles with his own mental health.

programme.title: Mafias Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Carmine Galante took the Mob into the world of heroin and even when locked up in jail, Galente still managed to control the streets and profit from his drug empire.

programme.title: Witness to A Massacre: Nanjing 1937
programme.desc: The Chinese government and military fled before Japan invaded Nanjing; the inhabitants stood defenceless, but a small group of brave foreigners stopped to help the civilian population.

programme.title: 2CELLOS - Itunes Festival
programme.desc: An annual music festival taking place over a month in London.

programme.title: Sarah Brightman: Symphony in Vienna
programme.desc: The soprano performs hit songs as well as music from her album "Symphony"; guests include Fernando Lima and Alessandro Safina.

programme.title: Willie Nelson: Live at iTunes Festival
programme.desc: American country singer and guitarist Willie Nelson performs his top tracks at the 2014 iTunes Festival.

programme.title: The Moody Blues - Days of Future Passed Live
programme.desc: Celebrating the 50th anniversary of their landmark album, Days of Future Passed, The Moody Blues took to the road to perform the entire LP live. An electric evening at The Sony Centre, Toronto, where the band was joined on stage by a full orchestra for the first time ever, is the definitive performance of this seminal album.

programme.title: R.E.M.: Milan 2008
programme.desc: Filmed at Arena Civica, Milan, this concert film will give all fans a live experience from start to finish; R.E.M. performs unforgettable version of their hits -- "Losing My Religion", "Drive," "Man On the Moon" and many more.

programme.title: Paul Rodgers: Free Spirit
programme.desc: The 16-song collection, Free Spirit, filmed in London, England returned Paul Rodgers to his roots, bringing fans an extraordinary evening.

programme.title: Paul McCartney: The Space Within Us
programme.desc: Paul McCartney performs Beatles hits and other songs in concert.

programme.title: Ziggy Marley: Live at the Filmore
programme.desc: A performance by Ziggy Marley at the Fillmore Auditorium in San Francisco.

programme.title: Robert Plant - Live in London 2014
programme.desc: ITunes Festival is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London.

programme.title: 30 Seconds to Mars: iTunes Festival 2013
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film gives all fans a spectacular live experience from start to finish; classic 30 Seconds to Mars songs feature unforgettable version of their hits: "This Is War," "Up In The Air," "Hurricane" and more.

programme.title: Elton John - Live in London 2013
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Classic Elton John featuring unforgettable version of his hits: Tiny Dancer, Rocket Man, Your Song and many more.

programme.title: Lady Gaga: Live in London
programme.desc: Lady Gagas performance at the iTunes Festival in London on September 1, 2013.

programme.title: Music, Money, Madness... Jimi Hendrix in Maui
programme.desc: An up-close look at Jimi Hendrix and his bands filming experience in Maui.

programme.title: Guns N Roses: Live From The O2 Arena London

programme.desc: Michelle Lira dreams of being a doctor, until one day a rollercoaster romance steers her life in a different direction, straight into a deadly ambush.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: Pam Jacobs reveals the dark truth about her father. Growing up, she never realised he was a fugitive suspected of the murders of various coin shop owners.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: When 22-year-old Helen McCourt went missing on a stormy night in February 1988, her mother Marie feared the weather was to blame. Little did she know, the real cause of her daughters disappearance was a lot more sinister, and would be the start of a lifelong campaign to find her.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: An escaped inmate murders Debra Johnson, a highly respected Correctional Administrator, at her home outside the prison. With the public at risk, police scour through surveillance footage for clues to hunt him down before he strikes again.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: A suspect sets fire to his home, and officers battle deadly floods.

programme.title: Scene of the Crime With Tony Harris
programme.desc: Tony examines the 1990 case of three prostitutes killed in Spokane, Washington. As a result of his further examination, he finds a pattern of murders and a suspect with a stunning new identity.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In May 2019 in Cedar Rapids Iowa, a shooter opens fire on four teenagers in a parked car then escapes with the help of a getaway driver. With a devastated community desperate for justice can surveillance video help police pick up the killers trail?

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: What exposed Tracie Andrews lie that a road rage attack killed her lover? Mike Gifford-Hulls TV plea for his missing wife Farsi hides the truth.

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: 17-year old Shafelias disappearance was a mystery - until her sister is arrested for a robbery. Carol Wardell vanished and her husband left tied-up.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town
programme.desc: When beloved teacher Margaret Jack Sliger is murdered on her farm, there is little evidence to go on. Will detectives find the killer and bring the community justice?

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1994, a rash of masked robberies plagued the Detroit area. When one homeowner shot back, the identity of the intruders was revealed.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Animal Cops San Francisco
programme.desc: Officers of the San Francisco Animal Protection and Care unit remember their most unforgettable stories.

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: A mother and daughter have been seriously injured after being thrown off their horses. And, the crew help a motocross rider who is in extreme pain.

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: The team perform a risky procedure to save a cyclist who has been knocked off his bike. Plus, a 19-year-old needs treatment for a gruesome leg injury.

programme.title: Cops UK: Bodycam Squad
programme.desc: A driver who failed to stop then reverses at speed down a footpath, hitting the door of a police car. Officers assist security guards in a tower block by removing two women.

programme.title: Cops UK: Bodycam Squad
programme.desc: Two teenagers throwing bricks engage in a rooftop stand-off with police, and officers seize a mobility car as the provider believes it has been used in crime.

programme.title: A Killers Mistake
programme.desc: Experts examine and discuss the key mistakes made within high-profile murder cases that then led to the eventual arrest of the culprits.

programme.title: Married to Evil
programme.desc: Police officer Andy Kimbrel hopes to find happiness with new wife Stephanie Keller, but when the marriage starts to fail, Andy falls victim to manipulation and violence;a fierce argument leads to tragedy, and police suspect something more.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: On the way to the airport to fly home to her fiancee, 19-year-old Katelin Akens makes an unexpected stop at a Virginia shopping mall, and vanishes. Who knows the truth?

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In 2021, talented high school football star KJ Taylor is killed during a drive-by shooting outside a West Virginia convenience store. CCTV helps detectives follow the trail of the truck spotted stalking KJs friends leading up to the shooting.

programme.title: The Killer In My Family
programme.desc: The relatives of murderers tell their stories, revealing how the crimes affected their families and whether there were any signs of murderous intentions beforehand.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Joann Albanese finds love again with a personal trainer named John Edwards, then John moves in but Joann discovers too late her new boyfriend isnt who he claims to be.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Ashley Pittman thinks she hit the lottery marrying Jeffrey Scott, and he gives her a cushier life than the one she left behind in small-town Louisiana; however, behind closed doors, a secret soon turns deadly.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.sub-title: He Almost Got Away With It
programme.desc: The heart-stopping accounts from people sharing their homes with loved ones, who become killers.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: When 38-year-old Michelle Gunshon went missing in December 2004, it wasnt long before police suspected murder, but with no body and a killer on the run, it would be seven years before justice prevailed.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: This true-crime series reveals how the deadliest crimes are solved by the only witnesses that never lie -- and where murderers have no place to hide: surveillance cameras.

programme.title: Deadly Legacy
programme.desc: Bill Bundy is never seen again after failing to come home from a party in 1976. Bills sister, Laura, contacts detective Moran to see if his disappearance is connected to John Wayne Gacys reign of terror in Chicago in the 1970s.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Questions and accusations fly after savvy entrepreneur and mother of five, 52-year-old Dee Warner, vanishes from her rural Michigan home. Authorities struggle for answers, until one day they find her, closer to home than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In 2009 in Tracy, Calif., a little girl vanishes after playing at a friends house, leaving her family desperate for answers; with no leads and few clues, investigators must rely on surveillance footage to piece together the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: On Valentines Day 2013, Oscar Pistorius shot and killed his girlfriend, Reeva Steenkamp. He said it was an accident, but does audio and TV footage suggest he was faking?

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: When John Tanners fiancee vanishes, he takes part in a reconstruction - is he faking it? Paul Dysons TV plea for his missing lover raises suspicions.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town
programme.desc: When 18-year-old Julie Heath goes missing in rural Arkansas, the small town begins a desperate search for her. However, no one expects the horror that ensues as the search begins.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Beirut armed extremists seize a plane and terrorise everyone on board. The CIA undertakes a daring operation to stop the hijackers; but will they succeed?

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Following a team of experts as they investigate whether evidence exists that could challenge the conviction of a man in prison for a murder he denies. Every year, over 500 people in the UK are convicted of murder. A guilty verdict can only be challenged if new evidence comes to light. Inside Justice is a specialist charity led by Louise Shorter, supported by a panel of criminal lawyers, ex-police officers and forensics experts who offer assistance to prisoners who are protesting their innocence.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Louise investigates a case, looking for evidence that could present grounds to bring an appeal, and ultimately overturn the conviction of a Southampton man in prison for the murder of his secret lover.

programme.title: When Fred Met Rose
programme.desc: Documentary series examining what led Fred and Rose West to become serial killers.

programme.title: Fred and Rose: The West Murders
programme.desc: Focuses on the notorious house which the couple shared in Gloucester. Fred and Rose murdered their first three victims - Anna McFall, Charmaine West and then Rena Costello - because they `got in the way. But when they moved into 25 Cromwell Street, the couple began to kill for sexual thrills.

programme.title: Fred and Rose: The West Murders
programme.desc: Looks at how a dogged police officer, Hazel Savage, fought to have the Wests patio excavated when she became suspicious about the whereabouts of their daughter. The film also includes insights from both Fred and Rose Wests former solicitors.

programme.title: The Feared: Irish Gangsters
programme.desc: True crime author Bernard OMahoney returns to his home country to shine a light on the Irish underworld. With exclusive access to high-profile Irish `faces, he enters uncharted territory when he discovers that there may be more to these crimes than meets the eye. He travels around the country through the workings of a dark criminal underworld with stories of extreme violence, poverty, and ultimately, the devastating consequences they bring.

programme.title: The Krays: The Myth Behind the Legend
programme.desc: Rivals and other contemporaries discuss gangsters Ronnie and Reggie Kray, who ran Londons East End.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld

programme.desc: An intimate portrait of Joan Fontaine, the Academy Award-winning actress who appeared in such films as Rebecca (1940), Suspicion (1941), Jane Eyre (1944) and Othello (1952).

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A driver picks up a hitchhiker before hearing on the radio that a serial killer is on the loose. Is the man sitting next to him in the passenger seat the killer?

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: The Last of the Midnight Gardeners
programme.desc: An adulterous magazine editor launches a competition for a story involving the perfect murder. But life soon mirrors art.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A shoplifter (Coleen Gray) is blackmailed into helping the store manager (Richard Long) in a crime of his own.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A meek clerk (Dick York) plots with his associates to rob their investment firm. With Wendell Holmes.

programme.title: Landscape Artist of the Year
programme.desc: Pitching easels and priming canvases to find out who is the Landscape Artist of the Year. Hopeful contestants try to paint their way to a life-changing cash prize in various locations across the country.

programme.title: The Brontes By Anita Rani: Sisters Of Disruption
D.H. Lawrence: Sex, Exile And Greatness
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the life and work of the novelist, poet, social critic and self-proclaimed outsider, who was often persecuted for his explicit subject matter.

programme.title: Wonderland: Science Fiction in the Atomic Age
programme.sub-title: Arthur C. Clarke To Ray Bradbury
programme.desc: Arthur C Clarke to Ray Bradbury: Explore how WWII shifted national literature and media power, with American tradition dominating post-war in influence and success.

programme.title: Learning to Live Together: The Return of Mad Dogs and Englishmen
programme.desc: Concert film spotlighting the infamous band with more than 30 members, reuniting after their era-defining tour of the 1970s.

programme.title: Borromini: The Dark Side of Baroque
programme.desc: Francesco Borromini, a true great of Baroque Rome, is known for his unparalleled genius, serving to revolutionise architecture forever. This documentary tells his story.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: Based on the botched mission during Americas military involvement in Somalia in the early 1990s. An attempt by US Army Rangers parachuted into Mogadishu to capture a warlords two top lieutenants goes disastrously wrong when two helicopters are shot down.

programme.title: Silent Night
programme.desc: A tormented father makes vengeance his lifes mission after his son is caught in a gangs crossfire and dies on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Annihilation
programme.desc: A group of elite warriors has less than a week to prevent Earth from becoming the domain of an evil warlord.

programme.title: Street Fighter
programme.desc: The cynical commander of Allied Nations forces has to prevent a warlord from taking over the world. With 63 hostages held in his seemingly impregnable fortress, the warlord is demanding an outrageously hefty ransom.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: The comic book web-slinger returns for a blockbusting sequel. Crime-fighting has cost Peter Parker his best friend and his true love Mary Jane. However, just as he quits as Spider-Man, New York comes under threat from Dr Octopus, a metal-tentacled madman. Peter has no choice but to swing back into action.

programme.title: Birds of Prey (and the Fantabulous Emancipation of One Harley Quinn)
programme.desc: After splitting with the Joker, Harley Quinn joins superheroes Black Canary, Huntress and Renee Montoya to save a young girl from an evil crime lord, Black Mask in Gotham City.

programme.title: Last Action Hero
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old Danny is given a magic ticket by a strange projectionist and is transported into the cinema screen. Thanks to his advance knowledge of the plot, he is able to help his silver-screen hero out of an awkward situation and becomes his partner. Theres trouble in store for the unlikely duo when the villain tries to seize the magic ticket.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Life is sweet for Peter Parker, MJ loves him, her career is taking off and Spidey-mania is sweeping New York. However, when an alien parasite bonds to his suit, its not long before the good times and Spidey turn bad. While his ugly ego is taking centre stage, MJ is dumped from her Broadway show, Harry remembers Spider-Mans role in his fathers death, and Peter is consumed by revenge.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: Diana, princess of the Amazons, is raised to be an unconquerable warrior on a sheltered island paradise. She discovers her full powers and true destiny after leaving home to join the fight to end all wars.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity, and inspired by Supermans selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists newfound ally Diana Prince to face an even greater threat. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to recruit a team to stand against this newly-awakened enemy. Despite the formation of an unprecedented league of heroes in Batman, Wonder Woman, Aquaman, Cyborg and the Flash, it may be too late to save the planet from an assault of catastrophic proportions.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Epic tale in which an intrepid archaeologist tries to beat a band of Nazis to a unique religious relic which is central to their plans for world domination. Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: Fast and Furious Presents: Hobbs and Shaw
programme.desc: Brixton Lorr is a cybernetically enhanced soldier who possesses superhuman strength, a brilliant mind and a lethal pathogen that could wipe out half of the worlds population. Its now up to hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless operative Deckard Shaw to put aside their past differences and work together to prevent the seemingly indestructible Lorr from destroying humanity.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: Battle-scarred stuntman Colt Seavers springs back into action when a movie star suddenly disappears. As the mystery deepens, he soon finds himself ensnared in a sinister plot that pushes him to the edge of a fall more dangerous than any stunt.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: Battle-scarred stuntman Colt Seavers springs back into action when a movie star suddenly disappears. As the mystery deepens, he soon finds himself ensnared in a sinister plot that pushes him to the edge of a fall more dangerous than any stunt.

programme.title: Rock Dog
programme.desc: Hoping to become a famous musician, a young Tibetan Mastiff leaves home to find a legendary and reclusive music artist, setting off a series of unexpected events.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: A sloth named Laura and her family move to the big city with nothing but their prized family recipe book and a rusted old food truck. The familys delicious food soon catches the eye of a quick-witted cheetah named Dotti.

programme.title: Scary Girl
programme.desc: To save her father from a dangerous scientist in a world shrouded in darkness, and prevent her planets destruction, a young girl overcomes her fears to travel to a mysterious city of light.

programme.title: Justice League Vs. Bizarro League
programme.desc: Superman, Batman and the rest of the Justice League team up with the Bizarro League to defeat Darkseid.

programme.title: Straight Outta Nowhere: Scooby-Doo Meets Courage the Cowardly Dog
programme.desc: Scooby-Doo and the Gang find themselves in the middle of Nowhere, Kansas, the backwoods hometown of Courage and his owners, Muriel and Eustace Bagge.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Flightless birds lead a mostly happy existence, except for Red, who just cant get past the daily annoyances of life. His temperament leads him to anger management class, where he meets fellow misfits Chuck and Bomb. Red becomes even more agitated when his feathered brethren welcome green pigs to their island paradise. As the swine begin to get under his skin, Red joins forces with Chuck and Bomb to investigate the real reason behind their mysterious arrival.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: Red, Chuck, Bomb and the rest of their feathered friends are surprised when a green pig suggests that they put aside their differences and unite to fight a common threat. Aggressive birds from an island covered in ice are planning to use an elaborate weapon to destroy the fowl and swine way of life. After picking their best and brightest, the birds and pigs come up with a scheme to infiltrate the island, deactivate the device and return to their respective paradises intact.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: The sequel to `Madagascar, in which New York Zoo animals, Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo, still stranded on Madagascar, start to leave the island. All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: When evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel take Papa Smurf, the Smurfs embark on a mission to the real world to save him. With help from some new friends, they must discover what defines their destiny to save the universe.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Dracula, who operates a high-end resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the counts teen-aged daughter.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody and Sherman
programme.desc: Mr. Peabody, the most accomplished canine in the world, and his boy, Sherman, use a time machine called the Wabac to embark on outrageous adventures. However, when Sherman takes the Wabac without permission to impress his friend Penny, he accidentally rips a hole in the universe and causes havoc with world history. Its up to Mr. Peabody to mount a rescue and prevent the past, present and future from being permanently altered. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: When evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel take Papa Smurf, the Smurfs embark on a mission to the real world to save him. With help from some new friends, they must discover what defines their destiny to save the universe.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, finds himself on a wild outdoor adventure when his long-lost father draws him into a high-stakes heist.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: A life-saving surgery fuses together a police officer and his faithful police dog -- and Dog Man is born. Learning to embrace his new identity, Dog Man must stop feline supervillain Petey the Cat from cloning himself and going on a crime spree.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Concerned that his half-human grandson isnt showing his vampire side, Dracula and his friends put the boy through a `monster-in-training boot camp just as Dracs old-school father decides to pay a visit.

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villains evil plot. With help from a reluctant trainer, the underdog must assume the role of fearsome samurai and save the day.

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villains evil plot. With help from a reluctant trainer, the underdog must assume the role of fearsome samurai and save the day.

programme.title: Kangaroo Jack
programme.desc: Two childhood friends get caught up in with the mob in New York and find themselves forced to travel to Australia to deliver $50,000. Their trouble really starts when they reach the outback, and a kangaroo bounds away with the cash.

programme.title: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby
programme.desc: A champion NASCAR drivers cosy position alongside his best friend at the top of the championship is threatened by a flamboyant French newcomer. With his confidence shattered, the driver draws on the help of his father and some eccentric training techniques to claw his way back to the top.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: An alcoholic millionaire is threatened with losing his inheritance if he does not marry the girl of his parents choosing. Despite his dislike for his prospective bride, he bows to the inevitable only to meet a light-fingered waitress who steals his heart. John Gielgud won an Oscar for his role as Arthurs loyal but outspoken valet.

programme.title: Its Complicated
programme.desc: When attending their sons college graduation, a couple reignite the spark in their relationship. However, the complication lies in the fact that they are divorced and he has remarried.

programme.title: The Terminal
programme.desc: Eastern European visitor Viktor arrives in New York only to find that his papers are no longer valid. Rules being rules, airport chief Dixon cant let Viktor into America, or let him leave. Viktor has to survive by his wits, and slowly becomes the darling of the airport, as his sweet nature charms all who work there - except Dixon.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A footballer is jailed for throwing a crucial game. Whilst inside, the football-loving warden sets him the task of coaching a team of prisoners to take on the all-conquering warders side. Can he form a disparate bunch of prisoners into a winning team?

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: Action-packed sequel in which a group of friends are reunited after their freshman year of college and embark upon a series of comical adventures when they rent a summer house on Lake Michigan.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing hes an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: Disgraced FBI agents Marcus and Kevin go to bizarre lengths to catch a devious millionaire. They disguise themselves as dumb white socialites Brittany and Tiffany Wilson, the heiresses to a hotel fortune who are under threat. Gross-out comedic farce from the makers of `Scary Movie.

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: Jim and Michelle are getting married and Jim struggles to win over his future in-laws and deal with his embarrassing dad. Meanwhile, Stifler isnt invited to the ceremony, but hes determined not to be left out.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: Ben Whittaker, a retired widower in his 70s becomes senior intern at a fashion based e-commerce company. Jules Ostin, the founder, while first hesitant, soon learns to respect and even like her new intern despite their age difference.

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and his mad companions leap onto the big screen. Expect the usual mad gross-out japes, from making snow cones out of urine to using the display toilets in bathroom outlets, and from racing golf carts over hallowed greens to tightrope walking over alligators.

programme.title: Jackass Number Two
programme.desc: Daredevils go for the gross-out when they subject an unsuspecting public to more outrageous stunts and practical jokes.

programme.title: Jackass 3
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and the gang unleash their most insane stunts yet, from roller-skating with a buffalo herd, to playing tennis with a beehive.

programme.title: Jackass 3
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and the gang unleash their most insane stunts yet, from roller-skating with a buffalo herd, to playing tennis with a beehive.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: A bittersweet story about a 43-year-old woman on the verge of divorce who magically travels back in time to her senior high-school years. She is able to act with the benefit of hindsight, but despite her efforts, she falls for the same boy all over again.

programme.title: Carmen
programme.desc: A woman on a quest to find freedom embarks upon a dramatic and life-altering journey from Mexico to Los Angeles.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. Maguires personal life starts to fall apart as hes torn between love and money in Cameron Crowes metaphor on Americans need for success and money.

programme.title: The Blind Side

His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent-turned-bodyguard finds danger and romance while protecting an entertainer from a stalker.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: After discovering that he can travel through time, a young man uses his ability to win the woman of his dreams and save his friend from professional disaster.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased fathers fortune, and a bright but awkward youth whos tired of his mothers depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: With the German Army now just across the Channel, newly-appointed Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide between negotiating a peace treaty with Hitler or standing firm. With the King, the public and his own political party all questioning his wisdom, the hard-drinking Churchill has to survive his own darkest hour and rally the country behind him.

programme.title: American Sniper
programme.desc: Based on the autobiography by Chris Kyle.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect comes to America to rebuild his life, his career, and his marriage. On his own in a strange new country, he settles in Pennsylvania, where a wealthy and prominent industrialist recognises his talent.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect comes to America to rebuild his life, his career, and his marriage. On his own in a strange new country, he settles in Pennsylvania, where a wealthy and prominent industrialist recognises his talent.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over
programme.desc: The Spy Kids set off on their third adventure. Secret Agent Carmen finds herself trapped in a 3-D virtual reality video game designed by their new arch nemesis, the Toymaker. Juni must save his sister, as they battle it out against lifelike 3-D monsters, completing each progressively harder level and ultimately trying to save the youth of the world.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
programme.desc: SpongeBob goes on a quest to discover a stolen recipe that takes him to our world, where he tangles with a pirate.

programme.title: The Borrowers
programme.desc: Based on the Mary Norton novels about a four-inch-tall family who live beneath the floorboards of a human house. The familys future is threatened when the house falls into the hands of an evil lawyer who plans to destroy it.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit and his three sisters -- Flopsy, Mopsy and Cotton-Tail -- enjoy spending their days in Mr. McGregors vegetable garden. When one of McGregors relatives suddenly moves in, hes less than thrilled to discover a family of rabbits in his new home. A battle of wills soon breaks out as the new owner hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a resourceful rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent.

programme.title: The Golden Child
programme.desc: A social worker who specialises in missing children is recruited to rescue a mystical Tibetan child from evil forces.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over
programme.desc: The Spy Kids set off on their third adventure. Secret Agent Carmen finds herself trapped in a 3-D virtual reality video game designed by their new arch nemesis, the Toymaker. Juni must save his sister, as they battle it out against lifelike 3-D monsters, completing each progressively harder level and ultimately trying to save the youth of the world.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
programme.desc: SpongeBob goes on a quest to discover a stolen recipe that takes him to our world, where he tangles with a pirate.

programme.title: The Wiz
programme.desc: In this version of the classic story - based on the smash Broadway musical - Dorothy is a shy 24-year-old Harlem kindergarten teacher who is brought by a snowstorm to the mysterious Land of Oz, a sprawling, decaying, nightmarish, and dangerous megalopolis that resembles the physical characteristics of New York City.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: In a countryside town bordering on a magical land, a young man ventures into the realm of fairies to retrieve a fallen star in order to win the heart of his beloved.

programme.title: Save The Cinema
programme.desc: Sky Original film following Welsh hairdresser Liz Evans fight to save her small towns theatre. Poignant British drama based on a true story starring Samantha Morton.

programme.title: The Golden Child
programme.desc: A social worker who specialises in missing children is recruited to rescue a mystical Tibetan child from evil forces.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: The Wiz

programme.title: The Wiz

programme.title: Waynes World
programme.desc: Wayne and Garth battle an evil TV producer in this big-screen adaptation of the `Saturday Night Live skit.

programme.title: Waynes World 2
programme.desc: Comedy sequel in which Wayne and Garth decide to stage a rock festival. After losing his late-night cable show, Wayne has a dream in which Jim Morrison tells him to put on a massive music festival - Waynestock. Before this can be achieved, the budding promoters must overcome several hurdles and sort out their turbulent love lives.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: A wealthy law student and a lower-class music student meet and fall in love while at Harvard. In the face of parental disapproval, they marry and are blissfully happy, until they discover that she has a fatal disease.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley is a Liverpudlian housewife stuck in a loveless marriage. One day she finds herself talking to the wall, and decides to make some changes in her life. Flying off to the Greek island of Mykonos on her own, she is gently romanced by middle-aged waiter Costas.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The story of a pair of blues musicians who try to raise the money to save an orphanage by reuniting their old band - nearly writing off Chicago in the process.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Marmee is the head of the March household in the absence of her husband, whos away fighting in the US Civil War. Her daughters range from the headstrong Jo and sweet Beth, to domesticated Meg and wilful Amy. The film follows the trials and tribulations of the girls, from early poverty and tragedy to Jos later efforts to secure both a husband and a successful writing career, and Amys relationship with an old family friend.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: The Fisher King
programme.desc: When a DJs sardonic exhortation to a late-night caller to wipe out a bar full of yuppies is taken literally, his world falls apart. Years later, on the point of suicide, he is saved by a similar casualty, a former medievalist whose wife was a victim of the bar bloodbath, and offered a chance for redemption by the mans quest for the Holy Grail.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: A gutsy prisoner earns the admiration of inmates and the wrath of guards by constant defiance and bids for freedom.

programme.title: Empire of the Sun
programme.desc: Young Jim has to grow up fast after the Japanese invade Shanghai. Separated from his parents and alone in a prisoner of war camp, Jim must fight to survive.

programme.title: The Krays
programme.desc: The disturbing story of the making of the infamous 60s underworld figures Reggie and Ronnie Kray - from their upbringing by a domineering mother in the deprivation of Londons East End. The gangland empire they build is characterised by violence and intimidation, and the film is unflinching in its depiction of their rise to power.

programme.title: The China Syndrome
programme.desc: Kimberly Wells is a TV news reporter, Richard Adams her cameraman. While shooting a routine piece at a nuclear power plant with manager Jack Godell, theres an emergency. A faulty gauge has resulted in cooling water being drained from the core. Seconds from disaster, Godell manages to avert `The China Syndome - in theory, the core melts, falls through the Earth and comes out in China.

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: Summer is in full swing. In the Cairngorms, Roberts cattle get their first taste of freedom and fresh grass. Jennis alpacas meanwhile, need a short back and sides from a specialist shearer. In North Uist, the herd is being prepared for an epic journey across a tidal sandbar, linking the stunning island of Vallay to the mainland and the crofts bulls. And in Moray, Nikki and Ollie are at last about to complete one of their holiday pods.

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: A piece of Ayrton Sennas race car and a poster from a Sex Pistols tour that never happened are up for grabs this time. Plus a gold and platinum plated car engine priced at £18k.

programme.desc: Philip Serrell, top trader Melissa Downhill and upholsterer Micaela Sharp head to Hay-On-Wye where they have just one day to find some bargains that they can turn into some flipping profit. When the time is up, the next stage of the challenge begins, and they have just three weeks to turn their buys into booty.

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: For many farmers, summer means one thing - show season - and the Royal Highland Show is the highlight in the calendar. The Barclays boys are showing pedigree Beltex and their finest Suffolks before going head-to-head in the Young Handlers competition. Its also a major event for budding young farmers Rachel and Camy, who, for the first time, are showing only animals raised on their own farm. Hopes are pinned on their Cheviot lamb Patch to prove shes every bit as good as Camy predicted.

programme.title: Adventures of a Plumbers Mate
programme.desc: A plumber hatches a plan to rid himself of his gambling debts.

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: Based on an Alistair MacLean story. Two United Nations troubleshooters on an apparently straightforward mission to Amsterdam find themselves in hot water when their fraud investigation leads them to Hong Kong. There they discover a high-stakes scheme which threatens the security of the world.

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: A guitar amp used by Jimi Hendrix draws in collectors and dealers. An ornate chair complete with pagan carvings sparks a bidding war. Theres also a bizarre hoard of celebrity hair. And a vintage travel trunk from the 1930s goes under the hammer.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and his team return for fifth series of the makeover show in which they transform unloved spaces into dream gardens for some very special people. In the first episode, Alan and the gang travel to Walsall, where they plan to surprise a young widow. Nina Perrin Seedhouse has three children under seven, and with a trio of youngsters to look after, she has not had time for anything else much - consequently her garden is just a bare, blank canvas.

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Fine art dealer Gavin Claxton, top trader Linda Lambert and master upholsterer Anthony Devine head to Oxford to find some bargains they can turn into some flipping profit. Rummaging through its antique shops, scrap yards and flea markets to find any hidden gems that will make them a huge profit.

programme.title: Country House Auction
programme.desc: An Egyptian amulet, a silver pin cushion and a collection of timepieces make the auction tick. But will someone be sitting pretty on some Louis XVI gilt chairs?

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: In Beccles, Suffolk, Mark meets Simon and Mary who live on a barge with their son Nate and their cats. They are planning to design and build a one of a kind floating home.

programme.title: James Mays Things You Need to Know...
programme.desc: How well do you know Albert Einstein? James May reveals some of the lesser known facts about the 20th centurys most iconic scientist by answering some big questions about Einsteins life and theories. Who wanted Einstein for President? How did a man falling off a roof change our universe? Whatever happened to Einsteins brain?

programme.title: James Mays Things You Need to Know...
programme.desc: Do you really know whats happening inside your head? With the aid of some mind boggling animation and motion graphics, James May cranks open your cranium to get the answers from 100 billion whizzing neurons on questions like why men dont ask for directions, why your memory is so bad and what love has in common with Class A drugs.

programme.title: Borderforce: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Cocaine is found inside the walls of a refrigerated truck. A traveller tries to smuggle weapons into Mexico. A Honduran immigrant, fleeing gang violence, seeks asylum in the US. And a father is caught trying to smuggle medicine for his son.

programme.title: Borderforce: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A shipment of methamphetamine camouflaged as cement is intercepted. Agents interrogate a Haitian immigrant who crossed nine countries on foot to reach the United States. A person accused of theft is arrested. And a woman is caught with diet pills.

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: Guy leaves his comfort zone as he takes to the water in a bid to set a new world speed record for a hovercraft. These machines float on a cushion of air and are notoriously difficult to control.

programme.title: Rick Steins Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits Vienna, home town to Strauss, Klimt and Freud and the city that gave its name to one of Europes most popular dishes - the Wiener Schnitzel.

programme.desc: Following the Department of Homeland Security Customs and Border Protection agency as they operate on the 28 bridges connecting the United States of America and Mexico.

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Sue Perkins and Liza Tarbuck drive the legendary Ho Chi Minh Trail, a network of dangerous roads hacked through mountains and jungles of Laos and Vietnam. Its role in the Vietnam War has left it one of the most perilous roads in the world as it is littered with unexploded bombs. Sue and Liza face a gruelling drive to some of the least explored sections of the trail.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Clarkson is given a Porsche 997 to see if he can be converted from being a lifelong Ferrari fan, James and Hammond - along with the British Amateur Rocket Society - attempt to convert a Reliant Robin into a space shuttle in 12 days, and Simon Pegg is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy, Richard and James go all rural as they harness a group of high-tech tractors and attempt to grow their own petrol. Meanwhile, the Lamborghini Murcielago LP640 dances with the devil on the test track, and Jeremy tries to stop his tongue lolling onto the floor as Kristin Scott-Thomas is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Chicken and Egg
programme.desc: Si and Dave lift the lid on the origins story of one of the worlds favourite fast foods - Southern Fried Chicken. Richmond, Virginia is home to an African American community - many of whom are direct descendants of the 19th century agricultural slaves. Chicken was of such low status at the time that the slaves were allowed to rear their own chickens and ultimately offered them a route to freedom.

programme.title: James Mays Things You Need to Know...
programme.desc: You might relish cabbage about as much as a two month bout of chickenpox, but would you consider it as a leafy long lost relative? James May does, thanks to the genius of a man who changed the world, Charles Darwin. Exactly how does Darwins famous theory of natural selection explain why we are all mutants and what war is actually good for?

programme.title: James Mays Things You Need to Know...
programme.desc: James May explains all you need to know about speed with a fast-moving mix of animation and motion graphics. He tries to figure out how you can catch speeding bullets in your teeth, why the Moon doesnt fall out of the sky, why his cat knows more about terminal velocity than he does and why a six-ton chicken can not run.

programme.title: Borderforce: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Following the Department of Homeland Security Customs and Border Protection agency as they operate on the 28 bridges connecting the United States of America and Mexico.

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: Guy takes on the challenge of building the fastest soapbox racer the world has ever seen, in an attempt to set a new speed record using just the pull of gravity and a tarmac road.

programme.title: Rick Steins Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits Bologna in northern Italy, a city so famous for its food that its known as the stomach of Italy. He learns how to make the local fresh egg pasta used for tortellini, tagliatelle, ravioli and lasagne. Theres stuffed rabbit, filled with Parma ham and parmesan frittata for dinner.

programme.title: Borderforce: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers hand over a convict to Mexican authorities in the middle of the Juarez Lincoln bridge, and a man drops a marijuana joint on a customs floor in Progreso.

programme.title: Borderforce: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A man fears for his life after being stopped by a cartel in Laredo, clubbers in Detroit are found with drugs disguised in liquid, and officers stop a shipment of frozen rats.

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Comedians Hugh Dennis and David Baddiel drive over 2000km of Ethiopias bone shaking roads in a quest to reach Aksum, known as the home of the Ark of the Covenant. Along the way they have to compete with truck drivers high on local drug khat, a calamitous breakdown and a shortage of fuel in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy, Richard and James build their own stretch limousines out of the most improbable cars and then use them to take some top celebrities to the Brit Awards. Meanwhile, a good ol boy Ford Mustang whoops around the test track and Billie Piper is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: A trip to find the best driving roads in Europe sees Jeremy behind the wheel of a Lamborghini Gallardo Superleggera, while Richard opts for the Porsche 911 GT3 RS and James tries his luck with the Aston Martin V8 Vantage N24. Plus The Star in a Reasonably Priced Car is the ever-regal Helen Mirren.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Chicken and Egg
programme.desc: In Israel, the Bikers visit the 2,500 year old archaeological remains of the worlds first poultry farm and also get a freaky glimpse into whats next for poultry. They play the locals at their own game by cooking a mouth-watering Shakshuka on the beach in super trendy, hipster Tel Aviv and make it their mission to discover if chicken soup really is the Jewish penecillin.

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson explores Parkgate, on the estuary of the River Dee in Cheshire. Today the village is landlocked, cut off from the Dee and the Irish Sea due to the estuarys shifting silt. But 250 years ago, it was a bustling harbour and as Ben finds out from Dr Gillian OBrian, Parkgate was a gateway for thousands of Irish immigrants from the 1620s onwards.

programme.title: Inside No. 9
programme.desc: Steve Pemberton and Reece Shearsmith return with a special festive story in their award-winning anthology series Inside No. 9. Joined by guest stars Shobna Gulati and Simon Callow, they serve up a disturbingly spooky tale. Its Christmas Eve and Dr Parkway has booked an overnight stay in a reputedly haunted church. But why is he so keen to be left alone by the eccentric warden and his other guests? A twisted ghost story for Christmas.

programme.title: Inside No. 9
programme.desc: East End villains Harry and Annie Blackwood were rotten to the core and did some truly horrible things when they were alive. What secrets did they take to their grave? Their sons plan to find out.

programme.title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
programme.desc: Ramkishen and his wife Mamta have three sons. Prem and Vinod have sweethearts in Preeti and Vivek marries Sangeeta. Since Vivek is Mamtas step-son, she plots to alienate him, but will she succeed?

programme.title: Gully Boy
programme.desc: A Mumbai street rapper comes of age while using his music to highlight inequalities.

programme.title: Aranmanai 4

programme.title: Saaya
programme.desc: When Rakesh, a prison escapee, tries to kill Supriya, she defends herself by setting him on fire. At the trial, Supriya reveals Rakeshs true intentions and his use of black magic.

programme.title: Padosan
programme.desc: Bhola has taken a vow to act according to the book of shashtras, which dictate that a man must marry when he is of the right age. However, he meets with Bindu and falls head in love with her only to learn she has given her heart to Master Pillai.
